response: ## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Podcast Player Without Transcripts **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Auditory Access, Screen Reader Semantic **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular & Motion, Keyboard & Motor, Cognitive & Neurodivergent --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 1 | | MAJOR | 3 | | MINOR | 0 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None. Both escalated perspectives have findings. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - **Missing transcript for audio-only content** — Auditory Access — CRITICAL — 1.2.1 - **Speed control does not announce current playback speed to screen readers** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.2 - **"New episode" indicator is visual-only dot with no text equivalent** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 1.1.1 - **New episode notification uses audio chime only with no visual/text indicator** — Auditory Access — MAJOR — 1.4.2 **Content Author** - **Episode descriptions exist only in audio with no visible text** — Auditory Access — MAJOR — 1.2.5 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Transcript completeness for all episodes (1.2.1) - Audio description coverage for visual-only information in episodes (1.2.5) --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** — MAJOR findings present. Address critical transcript absence and major accessibility barriers before shipping. --- ### A11y Evidence Findings #### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: missing-transcript-1.2.1 fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist wcag_or_apg: 1.2.1 Provide Alternatives for Time-Based Media section_508_fpc_context: 508(c)(1)(e) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: JSX: No transcript section in component; audio element lacks transcript link reproduction_steps: Inspect component source code expected_behavior: Each audio episode must have a visible transcript or link to transcript actual_behavior: No transcript section exists trend: new #### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: speed-control-aria-3.3.2 fingerprint: 8c6b2d9e source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 3.3.2 Labels or Instructions section_508_fpc_context: 508(c)(2)(f) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM evidence: JSX: `` **Fix:** Update `aria-label` dynamically to include current speed value ### MAJOR: "New episode" indicator is visual-only dot with no text equivalent (1.1.1) **Finding:** Red dot badge for new episodes has no `aria-label` or text alternative **WCAG:** 1.1.1 Non-text Content **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (primary), Visual Design (secondary) **Evidence:** JSX: `` **Fix:** Add `aria-label="New episode"` to the badge element ### MAJOR: New episode notification uses audio chime only with no visual/text indicator (1.4.2) **Finding:** Audio chime for new episodes has no visual indicator or screen reader announcement **WCAG:** 1.4.2 Audio Control **Perspective:** Auditory Access **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (primary), UX Design (secondary) **Evidence:** JS: `handleNewEpisode()` creates audio chime only **Fix:** Add visible badge and `aria-live` announcement for new episodes ### MAJOR: Episode descriptions exist only in audio with no visible text (1.2.5) **Finding:** Episode descriptions are spoken in audio intro but never rendered as visible text **WCAG:** 1.2.5 Audio Description **Perspective:** Auditory Access **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (primary), Front-End Dev (secondary) **Evidence:** JSX: No visible text for episode descriptions **Fix:** Add visible text descriptions for each episode in the list --- ## Key Evidence Citations 1. **Transcript absence** - JSX: No transcript section exists in component - CSS: `.no-transcript-notice` class defined but not used 2. **Speed control ARIA issue** - JSX: `
